{
  "children": [
    {
      "name": "ParseAndValidateInput",
      "purpose": "Parse the input JSON and validate the command field",
      "behavior": "Parse input JSON, check if command is one of allowed values, return parsed command and payload",
      "boundary": {
        "in_scope": ["JSON parsing", "command validation"],
        "out_of_scope": ["executing commands", "data access"]
      },
      "preconditions": ["input is valid JSON"],
      "postconditions": ["command is one of send/history/create_channel/join"],
      "guarantees": ["Returns error if command missing or invalid"],
      "composition_role": "validate",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "input", "type": "dict", "description": "Raw JSON input from parent", "source": "parent input"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains parsed_command and payload or error", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def ParseAndValidateInput(input: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [],
      "data_operations": [],
      "requested_capabilities": [],
      "constraints": [],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-001", "description": "Returns error for invalid JSON"}, {"ac_id": "AC-002", "description": "Returns error for unknown command"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "SendMessage",
      "purpose": "Send a message to a channel the user has joined",
      "behavior": "Check if user is member of channel, then store message in messages store",
      "boundary": {
        "in_scope": ["message storage", "membership check"],
        "out_of_scope": ["channel creation", "history retrieval"]
      },
      "preconditions": ["channel exists", "user is member"],
      "postconditions": ["message stored with timestamp"],
      "guarantees": ["Message not stored if user not member"],
      "composition_role": "execute",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "payload", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains user, channel, text", "source": "parent input"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [{"resource": "channels", "op": "read", "reason": "Check membership"}, {"resource": "messages", "op": "write", "reason": "Store message"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "Success or error response", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def SendMessage(payload: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "channels", "op": "read", "description": "Check membership"},
        {"variable": "messages", "op": "write", "description": "Store message"}
      ],
      "data_operations": [
        {"source_name": "channels", "operation_type": "read", "description": "Check membership"},
        {"source_name": "messages", "operation_type": "write", "description": "Store message"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["channels.read", "messages.write"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-001", "description": "Must not store message if user not member"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-003", "description": "Message stored when user is member"}, {"ac_id": "AC-004", "description": "Error returned when user not member"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-002"]},
      "node_type": "atomic_operation",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "GetHistory",
      "purpose": "Retrieve last 100 messages from a channel the user has joined",
      "behavior": "Check membership, then query messages store for channel, limit to 100",
      "boundary": {
        "in_scope": ["message retrieval", "membership check"],
        "out_of_scope": ["message sending", "channel management"]
      },
      "preconditions": ["channel exists", "user is member"],
      "postconditions": ["Returns at most 100 messages"],
      "guarantees": ["Returns error if not member"],
      "composition_role": "query",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "payload", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains user, channel", "source": "parent input"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [{"resource": "channels", "op": "read", "reason": "Check membership"}, {"resource": "messages", "op": "read", "reason": "Retrieve messages"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "List of messages or error", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def GetHistory(payload: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "channels", "op": "read", "description": "Check membership"},
        {"variable": "messages", "op": "read", "description": "Retrieve messages"}
      ],
      "data_operations": [
        {"source_name": "channels", "operation_type": "read", "description": "Check membership"},
        {"source_name": "messages", "operation_type": "read", "description": "Retrieve messages"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["channels.read", "messages.read"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-002", "description": "Must return at most 100 messages"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-005", "description": "Returns messages when user is member"}, {"ac_id": "AC-006", "description": "Error returned when user not member"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-003"]},
      "node_type": "atomic_operation",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CreateChannel",
      "purpose": "Create a new channel and add creator as member",
      "behavior": "Check if channel name already exists, if not create and add user to members list",
      "boundary": {
        "in_scope": ["channel creation", "membership initialization"],
        "out_of_scope": ["message operations", "joining existing channels"]

      "preconditions": ["channel name not empty"],
      "postconditions": ["channel exists with creator as member"],
      "guarantees": ["Returns error if channel already exists"],
      "composition_role": "execute",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "payload", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains channel name, user", "source": "parent input"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [{"resource": "channels", "op": "read_write", "reason": "Check existence and create channel"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "Success or error response", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def CreateChannel(payload: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "channels", "op": "read_write", "description": "Check existence and create channel"}
      ],
      "data_operations": [
        {"source_name": "channels", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "Check existence and create channel"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["channels.read_write"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-003", "description": "Channel name must be unique"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-007", "description": "Channel created when name does not exist"}, {"ac_id": "AC-008", "description": "Error returned when channel already exists"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-004"]},
      "node_type": "atomic_operation",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""

      "boundary": {
        "in_scope": ["membership addition"],
        "out_of_scope": ["channel creation", "message operations"]
      },
      "preconditions": ["channel exists"],
      "postconditions": ["user added to channel members"],
      "guarantees": ["Returns error if already member or channel missing"],
      "composition_role": "execute",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "payload", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains channel name, user", "source": "parent input"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [{"resource": "channels", "op": "read_write", "reason": "Check existence and add member"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "Success or error response", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def JoinChannel(payload: dict) -> dict",

      ],
      "data_operations": [

      "requested_capabilities": ["channels.read_write"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-004", "description": "User must not already be a member"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-009", "description": "User added when channel exists and not already member"}, {"ac_id": "AC-010", "description": "Error returned when channel missing or user already member"}],

      "node_type": "atomic_operation",
      "stop_decompose": false,
